title: FIGURES 3 – 7 in A new subterranean Iberian Cephennium with unusually modified metatrochanters (Coleoptera, Staphylinidae, Scydmaeninae)
author: Jałoszyński, Paweł
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: FIGURES 3 – 7. Cephennium gladiator sp. n., male. Humeral region of right elytron in dorsal view (3); head in ventral view (4); prothorax in ventral view (5); pterothorax in ventral view (6); intermetacoxal region and basal portion of left hind leg in ventral view (7). Abbreviations: bef, basal elytral fovea; bst, basisternal part of prosternum; cx, coxa; fe, femur; gp, gular plate; hd, humeral denticle; hyr, hypomeral ridge; mn, mentum; mscc, mesocoxal cavity; msvp, mesoventral intercoxal process; mtvp, metaventral intercoxal process; mxp, maxillary palp; nss, notosternal suture; om, ommatidium; pcr, procoxal rest; pm, prementum; ptp, posterior tentorial pit; smn, submentum; tr, trochanter; v 3, metaventrite.
